title: livistona mariae subsp. rigida
intro: Livistona mariae subsp. rigida, also known as the Palm of the Philippines, is a species of palm tree in the genus Livistona. It is a versatile plant with medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments. The Livistona mariae subsp. rigida has been found to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and extracts, to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
